headline: Preorders for Samsung’s new Z Fold and Flip 8 come with up to $350 in gift cards
summary: Samsung announced the new Galaxy Z Flip 8, Fold 8, and Fold 8 Ultra devices. Preorders are open now, with prices starting from $1,199.99. Customers can receive up to $350 in gift cards with their preorder.

headline: Philips’ new smart toothbrush shows you where you didn’t properly brush
summary: Philips launched the Next-Generation DiamondClean 9900 Prestige, an AI-powered smart toothbrush. It provides real-time brushing feedback via a glowing ring on its base. A touchscreen highlights areas of your mouth that may need more attention.

headline: Microsoft is bringing original Xbox games to PC
summary: Microsoft is expanding its Xbox backward compatibility efforts to include PC. An early preview now makes four classic original Xbox games available on PC. This move is part of a larger plan to bring more Xbox console games to PC in the future.

headline: AMD commits up to $5 billion to Anthropic
summary: AMD plans to invest up to $5 billion in the AI company Anthropic. The partnership aims to significantly expand Anthropic's computing power. Anthropic will deploy up to 2 gigawatts of AMD's Instinct MI450 AI GPUs.

headline: The State of Every PlayStation Studio - July 2026
summary: This report details the current projects under development at every PlayStation studio. Key titles mentioned include God of War Laufey and Marvel's Wolverine. It provides an overview of the games each studio is currently making.

headline: Stalker 2 Turned a Profit Before It Came Out Thanks to Money Microsoft Paid for Xbox Exclusivity
summary: Stalker 2 reportedly turned a profit before its official release date. This early profit was attributed to funding from Microsoft. Microsoft paid for the game's Xbox console exclusivity.

headline: Kevin Feige Says Marvel Has Movies Planned 'All the Way Up to 2042,' Including a Major X-Men Push and Live-Action Miles Morales
summary: Marvel Studios boss Kevin Feige confirmed movie plans extend to 2042. Future projects include a significant push for the X-Men franchise. Plans are also in motion for a live-action Miles Morales.

headline: Hasbro's The Legend of Zelda Figures Have Been Revealed, and They Look Amazing | Comic Con 2026
summary: Hasbro unveiled its first wave of 'The Legend of Zelda: Heroes of Hyrule' figures. The figures were revealed exclusively at Comic-Con 2026. An exclusive first look at all three figures has been provided.

headline: PC Harper's widow criticises early prisoner release plan as Burnham to review scheme
summary: Lissie Harper, widow of PC Harper, strongly criticized the proposed early release of prisoners. Reports suggest two of her husband's killers could be freed early. Andy Burnham is scheduled to review the controversial early release scheme.

headline: Most bus fares in England to be capped at £2 from January
summary: Most bus fares across England will be capped at £2. The new policy is set to come into effect starting in January. The government states this initiative aims to help with the cost of living.

headline: Ukrainian drones hit Russian online giant retailer Wildberries for second time
summary: Ukrainian drones conducted a second attack on Russian online retail giant Wildberries. Logistics hubs in the Krasnodar and Stavropol regions were struck overnight. This marks a repeated targeting of the company's infrastructure.

headline: Ex-Southern Water boss among four charged over alleged plan to manipulate water quality tests
summary: Matthew Wright, former boss of Southern Water, faces charges alongside three others. They are accused of an alleged plan to manipulate water quality tests. The scheme reportedly aimed to save the company millions in penalties.
